message:
Fix mobile button truncation in PromptDetailModal

- Restructured action buttons to use mobile-first approach:
  - Primary "Copy Prompt" button now full-width and larger (h-12)
  - Secondary actions (Install, Download, Report) in 2x2 grid on mobile
  - Text no longer truncates on narrow screens
- Fixed type errors in history API route, shared settings, and share page
- Updated beads for issue tracking

Fixes critical UI bug where "Copy Promp", "Install as Sk", "Downloac"
were shown cut off on mobile devices.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
